documents.content:
Subject: Complaint for SmartHome Security Camera , customer id: CUST10001
From: Shubham Sahu <shubhh2003@gmail.com>
To: arp290825@gmail.com
Date: March 07, 2026 01:17 PM

Hello Support Team,

I would like to report an issue with my SmartHome Security Camera.

Customer ID: CUST10001
Customer Name: Ananya Sharma

Product Name: SmartHome Security Camera
Product ID: PROD-EL-001
Model Number: ST-CAM-X200

Order Reference: ORD-20260307-001

The camera disconnects from WiFi frequently and stops recording
intermittently. The device appears offline in the mobile application even
though the internet connection is stable.

I have attached the purchase invoice and a photo of the device for
reference.

Please help resolve this issue.

Regards
Ananya Sharma
Customer ID: CUST10001

documents.name: invoice_sec_cam.png
documents.content: The image is an invoice for services related to security camera installation. It is issued to John Smith, with an invoice number #INV-000101, dated 02/20/2025. The total amount due is $660, which includes various services such as camera placement assessment, mounting, cable running, system installation, and remote monitoring connection. The invoice provides multiple payment options, including check, Zelle, and Venmo. There is no visible discrepancy in the billing details, and the invoice appears to be clear and legible.

autoEmailResponse.subject: Your Complaint Has Been Reviewed — CMP-ING-1773853318691-71fee3d
autoEmailResponse.body:
Dear Customer,

Thank you for contacting Consumer Electronics Customer Support.

We have received a complaint submission (Reference: CMP-ING-1773853318691-71fee3d), however we were
unable to locate a matching customer account in our system.

To process your complaint, we require a verified account with us. Please:

  1. Verify your customer reference number (format: CUST#####) and reply with it, or
  2. Contact us directly so we can locate your account:
       Email: support@electronics.com
       Phone: 1-800-ELEC-HELP  (Monday – Friday, 9am – 6pm)
  3. If you are a new customer, please register at our support portal before
     submitting a complaint.

We apologise for the inconvenience and look forward to resolving this for you.

Kind regards,
Customer Support Team
Consumer Electronics
